subcodes.first_line: Sanctified praise, transcending the limitations of contingent beings, befitteth that Revealer of Verses Who, through the sweetness of His call, hath drawn all creation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از تحدید ممکنات منزل آیاتی را سزاست که بحلاوت ندای خود جمیع خلق را
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering; rejection of Christ, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @wisdom [hikmat], @praise and encouragement
